OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DA92F1
Recv ID: 18DAF192
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 92
Func Name: BMS Master

  {
    "minbytes": 10,
    "replybytes": "59060000000086000000",
    "sentbytes": "190600000086",
    "name": "ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DrivenMileageWithFailurePresent",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "DTCMaskRecord": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
